name: Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd. engages in research, development, production, and sale of wear-resistant castings in China. The company provides integrated ball mill technology products, including Cr-Mn-W wear resistant cast iron grinding balls, integral step type lining plates, wear-resistant plastic and cast steel combined lining plates, split step type lining plates, and discharge grate rings; and programmable ion permeate technology products, such as piston rods, molds, pin and shaft sleeves, high strength bolts, wheel gears, clutch plates and brake pads, core shafts, piston rings, and valve rods. It also offers high-energy ion beam 3D spray welding technology products comprising rollers, wind turbine impellers, bucket tooth, glass plates, valve cones and valve seats, and ball mill liners. In addition, the company provides vanadium-titanium slag slurry pumps; multilayer roasting furnaces; hammers; clean coal powder upgrading furnaces; high-manganese steel ring gears; metal ceramic tubes for abrasion resistant faucets; metal ceramic erosion resistance arrow-type back-pressure valves; metal ceramic couplings for abrasion resistant oil well tubings; metal ceramic valve balls and valve seats of oil well pumps; anti-abrasion metal ceramic plungers; new generation slurry pump metal ceramic cylinder sleeves; abrasion/erosion resistant polycrystalline tungsten titanium ball valves; and crosslinked polystyrenes. The company was formerly known as Honyu Wear-Resistant New Materials Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd. in July 2020. Hunan Huamin Holdings Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Changsha, China.
